sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DEPTMASTER ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, DEPTLEVEL, DEPT_CD_PATH, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_MAIL#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, 1, #v_CN#, #v_LDAPPATH#, #nowDate#, #v_TENANT_ID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_DEPTMASTER (CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, USEFLAG, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADFLAG, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, TENANT_ID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, DEPT_CD_PATH, DEPTLEVEL ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, 'Y', #v_MAIL#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_EXTATTR4#, #v_EXTATTR5#, #v_EXTATTR6#, #v_EXTATTR8#, #v_EXTATTR9#, #v_EXTATTR10#, #v_EXTATTR15#, 'Y', #v_LDAPPATH#, #nowDate#, #v_TENANT_ID#, (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), CONCAT((SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), ',', #v_CN#), (SELECT DEPTLEVEL + 1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) )

INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER (CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, DEPARTMENT, TITLE, TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, POSTALCODE, STREETADDRESS, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, SIPURI, UPDATEDT, BIRTH, BIRTHTYPE, PASSWORD, TENANT_ID, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2 ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DISPLAYNAME#, #v_DISPLAYNAME2#, #v_MAIL#, #v_MAILNICKNAME#, #v_UPNNAME#, #v_PARENTCN#, #v_TITLE#, #v_TITLE2#, #v_TELEPHONE#, #v_HOMEPHONE#, #v_FAX#, #v_MOBILE#, #v_POSTALCODE#, #v_ADDRESS#, #v_EXTATTR1#,#v_EXTATTR6#, #v_EXTATTR10#, #v_EXTATTR102#, #v_EXTATTR14#, #v_EXTATTR15#, #v_LDAPPATH#, #v_MAIL#, #nowDate#, #v_BIRTH#, #v_BIRTHTYPE#, #v_PASS#, #v_TENANT_ID#, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#), (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPNM2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , DEPTLEVEL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET COMPNM2 = #v_COMPNM2#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2#, DEPTLEVEL = #v_DEPTLEVEL#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PARENTCN#, DEPT_CD_PATH = CONCAT(#v_DEPT_CD_PATH#, ',', CN) WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET DEPT_CD_PATH = REPLACE(DEPT_CD_PATH, #v_DEPT_CD_PATH_OLD#, CONCAT(#v_DEPT_CD_PATH#, ',', #v_CN#)), EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3#, COMPNM2 = #v_COMPNM2# WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#v_DEPT_CD_PATH_OLD#, ',%') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2#, COMPANY = #v_EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3#, COMPANY2 = #v_COMPNM2# WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE PROXYUSERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND StartDate < #nowDate# AND EndDate > #nowDate# ) > 0

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;', 'a=1;') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET $v_PROPNAME$ = #v_PROPVALUE# WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, DESCRIPTION3, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2, TITLE, TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, MOBILE, POSTALCODE, STREETADDRESS, INFO, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, MOBILE_ENABLE, MOBILE_NOTUSE, MOBILE_PIN, SIPURI,PASSWORD, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CN , DisplayName , DisplayName2 , mail , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , DESCRIPTION3 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , POSTALCODE , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , NULL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , #nowDate# , MOBILE_ENABLE , MOBILE_NOTUSE , MOBILE_PIN , SIPURI , PASSWORD , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL ( UID_,PARENTUID,DEPTH,DISPLAYNAME,DISPLAYNAME2,CREATORID,CREATORNAME,CREATEDATE,MODIFYDATE,WIDTH,HEIGHT,ROWLENGTH,COLUMNLENGTH,ROWSPLIT,COLUMNSPLIT,GUBUNFLAG,USEFLAG,COMPANYID,BASETYPE,THEMEUID,DEFAULTPAGE,TABLEVIEWOPTION,TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( 'ba3541ea-8da9-4fcf-b24b-29b1fb1aedf6','top',1,'ba3541ea-8da9-4fcf-b24b-29b1fb1aedf6',null,#userID#,#userName#,#nowDate#,null,-1,225,0,3,null,'250;250;9999;','1',null,#companyID#,null,'f2de22b9-9a3f-49a9-884b-2e179e564cbf',null,'D',#tenantID# ), ( 'bd7d2263-939b-481e-ae95-7aa70e67c5c3','top',1,'표준포탈페이지 A 테마','en_표준포탈페이지 A 테마',#userID#,#userName#,#nowDate#,null,-1,500,0,1,null,'9999;','1','Y ',#companyID#,null,'f2de22b9-9a3f-49a9-884b-2e179e564cbf','Y','D',#tenantID# ), ( 'd6e9c786-3af3-4c46-809d-267c2fd96976','top',1,'d6e9c786-3af3-4c46-809d-267c2fd96976',null,#userID#,#userName#,#nowDate#,null,-1,110,0,1,null,'9999;','1',null,#companyID#,null,'f2de22b9-9a3f-49a9-884b-2e179e564cbf',null,'D',#tenantID# ), ( 'd8dc7da6-7572-4853-801a-14072d823c65','top',1,'d8dc7da6-7572-4853-801a-14072d823c65',null,#userID#,#userName#,#nowDate#,null,-1,110,0,3,null,'250;250;9999;','1',null,#companyID#,null,'f2de22b9-9a3f-49a9-884b-2e179e564cbf',null,'D',#tenantID# ), ( 'e6e189b3-6a83-4c5e-90f3-61cbfd50c59c','top',1,'e6e189b3-6a83-4c5e-90f3-61cbfd50c59c',null,#userID#,#userName#,#nowDate#,null,-1,110,0,2,null,'500;9999;','1',null,#companyID#,null,'f2de22b9-9a3f-49a9-884b-2e179e564cbf',null,'D',#tenantID# ), ( '054a5b35-d8d5-4b07-9e47-d7820bf59435','top',1,'054a5b35-d8d5-4b07-9e47-d7820bf59435',null,#userID#,#userName#,#nowDate#,null,-1,110,0,3,null,'250;250;9999;','1',null,#companyID#,null,'f2de22b9-9a3f-49a9-884b-2e179e564cbf',null,'D',#tenantID# ), ( 'df178301-cfe4-46d9-8c0f-80e9f92673a9','top',1,'df178301-cfe4-46d9-8c0f-80e9f92673a9',null,#userID#,#userName#,#nowDate#,null,-1,110,0,1,null,'9999;','1',null,#companyID#,null,'69ae464d-e0ab-4558-b42b-4c9679474377',null,'D',#tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL ( UID_,DISPLAYNAME,DISPLAYNAME2,PORTLET_TYPE,URL,MAXURL,SHOWTITLEBAR,USERTYPE,HEIGHT,GUBUNFLAG,COMPANYID,BASETYPE,USEPOTALGUBUN,WIDTH,FRAMETYPE,TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( 'c06b1862-ce83-4472-91d7-fd92cee3a7ac','포토게시판_포틀릿','en_포토게시판_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=c06b1862-ce83-4472-91d7-fd92cee3a7ac',null,'0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,548,'iFrame ',#tenantID# ), ( 'c08c6efa-7494-4185-b1dc-09ecc908f683','공지게시판_포틀릿','en_공지게시판_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=c08c6efa-7494-4185-b1dc-09ecc908f683',' ','0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,280,null,#tenantID# ), ( 'c1479aa0-824d-43ff-a7f6-999ad660378a','배너_우수사원_포틀릿','en_배너_우수사원_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=c1479aa0-824d-43ff-a7f6-999ad660378a',' ','0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,330,null,#tenantID# ), ( 'f90b6413-c94c-4c6f-abe5-39480da308f1','우수커뮤니티_포틀릿','en_우수커뮤니티_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=f90b6413-c94c-4c6f-abe5-39480da308f1',' ','0 ','1 ',235,'0',#companyID#,null,null,330,null,#tenantID# ), ( '0b4d7088-ea3c-4afb-ac2e-862cfa69bbb3','슬라이드이미지_포틀릿','en_슬라이드이미지_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=0b4d7088-ea3c-4afb-ac2e-862cfa69bbb3',' ','0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,517,null,#tenantID# ), ( '69f68282-5617-45ca-9118-27b6170df5c3','포토_생일 통합 포틀릿','포토_생일 통합 포틀릿_en',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=69f68282-5617-45ca-9118-27b6170df5c3',' ','0 ','1 ',240,'0',#companyID#,null,null,1150,null,#tenantID# ), ( '73c0940e-5d44-4edc-bfa3-822fd6fd17b5','공지_슬라이드_이모저모 통합 포틀릿','공지_슬라이드_이모저모 통합 포틀릿_en',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=73c0940e-5d44-4edc-bfa3-822fd6fd17b5',' ','0 ','1 ',240,'0',#companyID#,null,null,1150,null,#tenantID# ), ( '7851b606-aa1c-4f96-ba9b-562432b922a6','결재사용현황_포틀릿','en_결재사용현황_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=7851b606-aa1c-4f96-ba9b-562432b922a6',' ','0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,348,null,#tenantID# ), ( '8af6e9a5-0970-45a9-9495-ba0c7a9163fd','결재_메일 통합 포틀릿','en_결재_메일 통합 포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=8af6e9a5-0970-45a9-9495-ba0c7a9163fd',' ','0 ','1 ',235,'0',#companyID#,null,null,797,null,#tenantID# ), ( '8fd70c9a-83b2-4294-a57b-9a59abe3850d','설문통계_포틀릿','en_설문통계_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=8fd70c9a-83b2-4294-a57b-9a59abe3850d',' ','0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,265,null,#tenantID# ), ( '94dfe6d0-043a-4284-bde5-8275aba64d6e','마이게시판_포틀릿','en_마이게시판_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=94dfe6d0-043a-4284-bde5-8275aba64d6e',' ','0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,512,null,#tenantID# ), ( '9b157fdc-057d-4c5c-b036-f2107adf7f0b','활용하기_포틀릿','en_활용하기_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=9b157fdc-057d-4c5c-b036-f2107adf7f0b','2345235','0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,240,'DIV ',#tenantID# ), ( 'a37406b2-7a0a-48b0-a2a9-aacf811e9bd4','직원생일_포틀릿','en_직원생일_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=a37406b2-7a0a-48b0-a2a9-aacf811e9bd4',null,'0 ','1 ',225,'0',#companyID#,null,null,338,'DIV ',#tenantID# ), ( 'a2149765-4c0b-466c-9e61-310925139d3c','사용자정보통합_포틀릿','en_사용자정보통합_포틀릿',1,'/ezPortal/urlPortlet.do?uID=a2149765-4c0b-466c-9e61-310925139d3c',' ','0 ','1 ',220,'0',#companyID#,null,null,1150,null,#tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_THEME_GENERAL ( UID_,DISPLAYNAME,DISPLAYNAME2,DISPLAYNAME3,DISPLAYNAME4,IMAGEURL,TOPURL,MAINURL,COMPANAYID,CREATORID,CREATORNM,CREATEDATE,MODIFYDATE,TOPHEIGHT,TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( 'f2de22b9-9a3f-49a9-884b-2e179e564cbf','표준모듈 A 테마 ','표준모듈 A 테마 _en','표준모듈 A 테마 _ja','표준모듈 A 테마 _zh','/files/upload_portal/S907000/Theme/08c5179c-1c9d-46e8-bea3-9c4495fa3704.jpg','/ezPortal/topMenu.do','/ezPortal/portalPage.do',#companyID#,#userID#,#userName#,#nowDate#,#nowDate#,100,#tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM ( SELECT CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END DISPLAYNAME2, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (DEPTLEVEL = 1 AND CN <> 'Top') ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , mail , TelephoneNumber , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, '') IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME
SELECT * FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT A.CN , A.DEPTID , A.POSITIONCD , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE B.COMPNM2 END COMPANYNAME , A.TITLE T1 , A.TITLE2 T2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.CN = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_CN# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY B.DISPLAYNAME
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ( CN, DEPTID, TITLE, TITLE2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_CN#, #v_DEPTID#, #v_TITLE1#, #v_TITLE2#, #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, '') IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%$v_TYPE$%'

SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DESCRIPTION, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS TITLE, MAIL, TELEPHONENUMBER, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE NULLIF(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, '') IS NOT NULL AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%$v_TYPE$%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME LIMIT #v_STARTNUM#, #v_COUNT#
SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCNT FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , REPLACE(SUBSTR(UpdateDT,1,10),'-','') UPDATEDT FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY UPDATEDT DESC LIMIT #v_STARTROW#, #v_ROWPERPAGE#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERMASTER ( CN, DisplayName, DisplayName2, mail, MAILNICKNAME, UPNNAME, Department, Description, Description2, Description3, PhysicalDeliveryOfficeName, Company, Company2, Title, Title2, TelephoneNumber, HomePhone, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, Mobile, postalcode, streetaddress, info, extensionAttribute1, extensionAttribute2, extensionAttribute3, extensionAttribute4, extensionAttribute5, extensionAttribute6, extensionAttribute7, extensionAttribute8, extensionAttribute9, extensionAttribute10, extensionAttribute102, extensionAttribute11, extensionAttribute12, extensionAttribute13, extensionAttribute14, extensionAttribute15, ADSPath, UpdateDT, Mobile_Enable, Mobile_NotUse, Mobile_PIN, SIPURI ,PASSWORD, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , #v_PARENTCN# , (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) , (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) , DESCRIPTION3 , (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) , (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) , (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AA WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) , TITLE , TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , POSTALCODE , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , #nowDate# AS UPDATEDT, MOBILE_ENABLE , MOBILE_NOTUSE , MOBILE_PIN , SIPURI, PASSWORD, #v_TENANT_ID# FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET DESCRIPTION = #displayName#, DESCRIPTION2 = #displayName2# WHERE DEPARTMENT = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET DEPARTMENT = #v_PARENTCN#, DESCRIPTION = (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), DESCRIPTION2 = (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), COMPANY = (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA), COMPANY2 = (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM (SELECT COMPNM2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#v_PARENTCN# AND TENANT_ID=#v_TENANT_ID#) AA) WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT a.cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER a INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER b ON a.department=b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id ORDER BY cn
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) WHERE cn = #cn#
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute1 = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM ( SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #cn# UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #cn# UNION SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #cn# ) AA
SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE department = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET updatedt = #nowDate#
displayName = #displayName# displayName2 = #displayName2# mail = #mail# extensionattribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# extensionattribute2 = #extensionAttribute2# extensionattribute3 = #extensionAttribute3# extensionattribute4 = #extensionAttribute4# extensionattribute5 = #extensionAttribute5# extensionattribute6 = #extensionAttribute6# extensionattribute7 = #extensionAttribute7# extensionattribute8 = #extensionAttribute8# extensionattribute9 = #extensionAttribute9# extensionattribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# extensionattribute11 = #extensionAttribute11# extensionattribute12 = #extensionAttribute12# extensionattribute13 = #extensionAttribute13# extensionattribute14 = #extensionAttribute14# extensionattribute15 = #extensionAttribute15#
WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET updatedt = #nowDate#
displayName = #displayName# displayName2 = #displayName2# title= #title# title2 = #title2# extensionAttribute15 = #extensionAttribute15# extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6# extensionAttribute14 = #extensionAttribute14# extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10# extensionAttribute1 = #extensionAttribute1# extensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2# extensionAttribute3 = #extensionAttribute3# extensionAttribute102 = #extensionAttribute102# telephoneNumber = #telephoneNumber# homePhone = #homePhone# facsimileTelephoneNumber = #facsimileTelephoneNumber# mobile = #mobile# postalCode = #postalCode# streetAddress = #streetAddress# birthType = #birthType# birth = #birth# info = #info#
WHERE cn = #cn# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET mail = #MAIL# WHERE cn = #CN# AND tenant_id = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE cn = #v_CN# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
